headline: Truist Securities Maintains Hold on Fidelity National Info, Lowers Price Target to $50
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Matthew Coad   maintains Fidelity National Info (NYSE:FIS) with a Hold and lowers the price target from $57 to $50.
